semantic_text: Complete Electronic Signature System: PDF branding, signature pad, eIDAS compliance, verification codes, audit trails - Build: 19.8 kB (+60% features)
🔧 Fix TypeScript error in hours-approval route - workDays is JSON field

🚀 LATEST VERSION: Deploy with all newest features and improvements - Enhanced error handling, improved personnel edit page, updated leave management components, latest database schema improvements, ready for production deployment

Complete System Upgrade: Advanced Role System, Electronic Signatures & Professional HR Management - 6-tier role hierarchy, Electronic signatures with eIDAS compliance, Professional PDF generation, Enhanced email composer, Smart scheduling optimization, Updated README with comprehensive documentation - Production ready

Fix Contract Management Navigation: Person-specific contract pages with proper routing, template parameter support, auto-form opening, enhanced UI for individual employee contract management - Contracts page now 20.3 kB with full user-specific functionality
Add admin setup API route for production

feat: complete UX overhaul of Schedule Templates page - Replaced emoji icons with professional Heroicons throughout the interface - Added modern gradient header with statistics dashboard and MetricCards - Implemented consistent filled button styling (blue=edit, indigo=duplicate, red=delete) - Enhanced templates view with modern card layouts, shadows, and hover effects - Added category icons with consistent color coding for different template types - Improved mobile responsiveness with better breakpoints and layouts - Updated assignments view with professional search interface and clean card design - Added user avatars with initials and gradient backgrounds - Enhanced visual hierarchy with better spacing, typography, and accessibility - Removed debug sections and simplified assignment management interface - Created enterprise-grade professional appearance consistent with other admin pages

🚀 REBRAND TO CREWFLOW: Complete project transformation - Updated package.json with CrewFlow branding (v1.0.0) - Created comprehensive README.md with Dutch-focused features - Optimized vercel.json for new deployment - Ready for fresh Vercel deployment as 'crewflow' - Modern HR platform branding and documentation

fix: improve Personnel page button alignment and card layout - Add consistent fixed bottom section for all cards with proper button positioning - Implement flexbox layout with flex-1 content area and fixed button section - Ensure all Beheren buttons align at same height across cards - Add consistent spacing and padding for better visual hierarchy - Update both active and archived employee card layouts - Improve mobile responsiveness with full-width buttons on small screens
Enhanced Email Composer: Rich Text Editor with UX Best Practices - Professional formatting toolbar, enhanced templates, better UX design - Size: 12.4 kB (+1.2 kB for rich editor features)
Fix contract management syntax errors and email modal implementation - Enhanced inline forms working properly with email compose modal

fix: improve MetricCard alignment and consistency - Add consistent heights for all MetricCard components - Ensure all cards render trend section space even when empty - Add trends to all leave request metrics for uniform layout - Fix visual alignment issues in Leave Requests admin dashboard - Create professional and consistent card grid layout

🐛 Fix leave balance edit button visibility - Add debug info to show current user role - Make edit button always visible for ADMIN/MANAGER users - Add fallback text when user doesn't have proper permissions - Improve button visibility and accessibility in personnel profile
Update schedule management: improved admin interface, assignment filtering, debugging tools, and support for varied work schedules
Remove package-lock.json to force fresh install

🎯 Add HUGE visible leave balance edit button - Added massive, obvious button for setting leave balances - Prominent yellow button that can't be missed - Located directly in aanwezigheid tab before leave balance display - Perfect for initial setup of leave balances when implementing CrewFlow - Clear instructions and year selection
Fix: Remove duplicate 'Aanwezigheid en Verlof Beheer' section and fix tab structure
Smart Schedule Management: Automatic rosters for permanent employees, manual assignment only for flex workers - Improved workflow efficiency by eliminating double work for fixed patterns

🗄️ POSTGRESQL SETUP: Complete database configuration for CrewFlow - Added comprehensive .env.example with PostgreSQL Neon database - Created database setup script for automated deployment - Added database management scripts to package.json - Configured for PostgreSQL instead of MySQL - Ready for Vercel deployment with Neon database - All environment variables documented and configured
Improve admin interface: replace browser alerts with toast notifications, enhance layout and styling for company settings and user roles pages
